Mixed martial arts events
2003 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 24, 2003
Last dateDecember 14, 2003
Events
Total events17
Fights
Total fights140
Title fights5
Chronology
2002 in Shooto 2003 in Shooto 2004 in Shooto

The year 2003 is the 15th year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2003 Shooto held 17 events beginning with, Shooto: 1/24 in Korakuen Hall.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2003
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Lightweight Joachim Hansen def. Takanori Gomi (c) Decision (Majority) 3 5:00 Shooto: 8/10 in Yokohama Cultural Gymnasium [a]
Featherweight Alexandre Franca Nogueira (c) vs. Stephen Palling Draw 3 5:00 Shooto: 8/10 in Yokohama Cultural Gymnasium [b]
Bantamweight Ryota Matsune def. Masahiro Oishi (c) Decision (Majority) 3 5:00 Shooto: 8/10 in Yokohama Cultural Gymnasium [c]
Lightweight Vítor Ribeiro def. Joachim Hansen (c) Submission (Arm-Triangle Choke) 2 2:37 Shooto: Year End Show 2003 [d]
Flyweight Mamoru Yamaguchi def. Yasuhiro Urushitani Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Year End Show 2003 [e]
  1. ^ For the Lightweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the Featherweight Championship.
  3. ^ For the Bantamweight Championship.
  4. ^ For the Lightweight Championship.
